items.description:
Ee kahani ego gaon ke ba, jahaan auraton ke naam par makkhi tak na baithela. Gaon ke kunwaara randuaa log eddi utha-utha ke apna rishta ke intezaar karela. Sundaro ohi gaon ke ego randuaa ha, jekara ke rishta ke baat hoti, ta lekin Kalu aur Leelu bigaad delela.
Gaon mein ego shart lagal – "Jekara ghar mein bahu aayi, uu sarpanch banla ke laayak hoyi!"  
Sundar biyaah karke ego aurat ke apna ghar le aila, lekin uu kahe lagle – "Inkar ghunghat na uthaa sake!"  
Ab Leelu aur Kalu bahut jugad lagaw

items.description: Ego saadharan laika Bihar se Mumbai sapna poora kare aawela, lekin shahar mein okra ke badmaash loot lewelan. Okra paas khaali 500 rupiya bachela. Police se niraasha ke baad, ek local gunda okra ke pav bhaji ke laalach deke apradh ke duniya mein ghusa delela. Khatarnaak sauda bigde par, oo apna hoshiyari aur himmat se poora khel palat delela. Raat bhar mein Mumbai ke naya "bhai" ban ke, ₹100 crore ke saamrajya khada kar lela. Ee ba ego gareeb laika ke kahani, jawan ek raat mein apna takdir bada

Saath-saath raua ee jaanb ki ka Vishu ke naukri laag paayi aur okar biyaah ho paayi ki na? Ee kahani dosti, sangharsh aur sapna ke poora kare ke jaddojahad par aadharit ba. Dekhal jaayi, ee dosti aur sapna ke safar kaise poora hola.

Kahani ee batavela ki kaise zameen aur sarkari naukri chhote-chhote gaon mein rahe wala logan ke zindagi badal sakela.
Vishu Haryana ke gaam mein rahe wala har laika jaisan ba, jwan chanchal swabhaav ke ba aur okar dil bahute saaf ba. Okare khatir duniya ke kucho badal sakela, baaki dosti aur bhaichaara ke u hame

items.description: Dhakad Chhoriyaan (Brave Girls) in Haryanvi is all about women empowerment and the pitfalls that are faced by those who dare to defy the patriarchal mores. The delay in the judicial process and how that can result in extreme steps being taken is projected in no uncertain terms. Whatever is the spoken language of the film, the frustration of women fighting the system is boldly stated in the film.

items.title: Modern Baba

items.description: Gaon ka sabse shararti ladka Bhand kuch saal baad goan aata hai aur Tau Jhand se aakar roj milta hai. Tau Jhand uss se picha chudwana chahta hai aur uski har baat ka ulta jawab deta hai. Lekin Bhand hamesha Tau ko apni baaton mein uljakar baatcheet mein badal deta hai. Dono mein aksar dialoguebaazi aur behas chalti rehti hai.
items.title: Tau Jhand Beta Bhand

items.description: Kuch aese log jinhone bahut himmat jutaye rakhi hai aur laakh adchanon ke baawzood khade rahe hain aur aage badhte rahe hain jinko hum unke kaamon ki sarahna hi kar sakte hain ya hoslaafjai taaki aur log unse prerit hon aur wo bhi kuch aese hi achhce kam karein jinse sabka bhala ho. Aaiye hum bhi thoda aese logon ki himmat ki daad de dein.
items.title: Teri Himmat Ki Daad Dyun Sun

items.description: Iss show mein aapne dekhen ne milega ki Haryana ke tau kitne digital ho liye, Tau google gel baat kare jave hai, Youtube pe ajab-gajab video dekhe jave hai, Whatsapp pe shayari padhe jave hai, Baki tame khud dekhoge toh nyara e maja aavega.
items.title: Digital Tau

items.description: Haryana ke logo ko hansi majak ke liye bahut prasidh hai. Haryanvi mein kuch bhi baat kaho majak lagti hai toh aaj hum laye hain kuch aise chutkule jo saalon se chalte aa rahe hain aur har chaupal mein log un par hanste hain. Aaiye aap bhi suniye haryana ke kuch prasidh chutkule. Iska production Akash Saini dwara kiya gaya hain.
items.title: Chaupali Makhol

items.description: Byah hona koi asaan baat nahi hoti aur wo bhi Haryana mein jahan ladkiyon ki itni kami hai aur naukriyan bhi kam hoti ja rahi hain toh hum ek aisa hi series aapke samaksh laye hai jismein kayi chote-chote muddo ko bade hansi majak mein uthaya gaya hai jinko dekhkar aap manoranjit mehsus. Toh dekhte hai kaise hota hai Fandu Ka Byah, Kya- Kya adchane aati hain aur fir kaise ye sab mukaam par pahuchta hai.
items.title: Byah Fandu Kaa

items.description: Bachpan ki baatein, bachpan ki yaadein aajtak kaun bhula paya hai aur kuch baatein toh aisi dil mein bas jaati hain, Jo har waqt yaad aati hain. Jinhone hamare jeevan mein bahut prabhav dala ho. Yaadein Bachpan Ki ka season 2 aapke samaksh laye hain toh aaiye dekhte hain.
items.title: Yaadein Bachpan Ki

items.description: Iss Haryanvi CID ke zariye humne aap sab ka pura manoranjan karwaan ki koshish kari hai. Aap khud soch ke dekho, Je CID team Haryana ki ho toh kise-kise case unke pass avenge aur Haryana aale unka kyunkar samadhaan karenge. Sochan me e itna maza aave hai toh dekhan me kitna aavega. Aajyo dekhenge Haryana CID.
items.title: Haryanvi-CID
